## How was it tested?

Describe the verification (screens exercised, routes hit, seed data used). "It compiles"
is not enough — it should be verified in the running app.

## Checklist (definition of done)

- [ ] Verified end‑to‑end in the running app (backend `:3001`, frontend `:3000`)
- [ ] UI is dark‑mode consistent and English (comments may stay Spanish)
- [ ] Backend calls go through `services/api.js` (or a documented raw exception)
- [ ] New routes tested and functional
- [ ] Migrations generated **and** applied, no model ↔ migration drift
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes (0 warnings)
- [ ] No secrets committed
